blended.narrative: Wachusett Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,218 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
